title: (Bullish Signal) PJT enters Uptrend as Momentum indicator ascends above 0 level on Mar 10, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This indicator may be signaling that PJT's price has momentum to move higher, since its current price exceeds the price logged 14 days ago. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor backtested 83 similar cases where PJT's Momentum Indicator exceeded 0, and 67 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 81%. Current price $71.71 crossed the resistance line at $71.68 and is trading between $71.82 resistance and $71.68 resistance lines. Throughout the month of 02/05/21 - 03/10/21, the price experienced a -1% Downtrend, while the week of 03/03/21 - 03/10/21 shows a +2% Uptrend.

https://preview.redd.it/4t0s9qzk2gm61.png?width=1533&format=png&auto=webp&s=5873e8db734c413a560b41a7eb268f6a1bccee9e

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The RSI Indicator points to a transition from a downward trend to an upward trend -- in cases where PJT's RSI Indicator exited the oversold zone, 23 of 31 resulted in an increase in price. Tickeron's analysis proposes that the odds of a continued upward trend are 74%.

The Stochastic Indicator suggests the stock price trend may be in a reversal from a downward trend to an upward trend. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 38 of 49 cases where PJT's Stochastic Oscillator exited the oversold zone resulted in an increase in price. Tickeron's analysis proposes that the odds of a continued upward trend are 78%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) for PJT just turned positive on March 10, 2021. Looking at past instances where PJT's MACD turned positive, the stock continued to rise, Tickeron A.I. shows that in 39 of 51 cases over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 76%.

Following a +3.07% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where PJT advanced for three days, in 253 of 353 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 72%.

PJT may jump back above the lower band and head toward the middle band. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options.
